meta.title: Book a free 15-minute intro call
meta.description: Pick a time for a free 15-minute intro call with Ida. No commitment — just a conversation about your child, your helper, and whether Evolve Sprouts is the right fit.

socialImage.alt: Book a free intro call with Evolve Sprouts

hero.description: Choose a time that works for you. In 15 minutes we can talk through your situation and whether the programme is a good fit — no pressure.

items.title: 15 minutes, one-on-one
items.description: A short video or phone call at the time you choose. We'll stay on topic so you leave with clarity.

items.title: No commitment
items.description: There is no fee and no obligation to enrol. If it is not the right fit, that is okay.

items.title: A practical next step
items.description: If Evolve Sprouts can help, we will outline what joining would look like. If not, we will point you in a helpful direction.

items.title: Length
items.description: The call is 15 minutes. Please join on time so we can make the most of it.

items.title: Languages
items.description: The intro call is conducted in English.

items.title: Rescheduling
items.description: Need to change your time? Reply to your confirmation email or message us on WhatsApp and we will help manually.

items.question: How long is the intro call?
items.answer: 15 minutes. We keep it focused so you get clear answers without taking too much out of your day.

items.question: Is it really free?
items.answer: Yes. There is no charge for this intro call.

items.question: What if I am running late?
items.answer: Please try to join on time. If you are delayed, message us on WhatsApp as soon as you can — we may need to reschedule if the window has passed.

items.question: How do I cancel or reschedule?
items.answer: Reply to your confirmation email or message us on WhatsApp. In version one, changes are handled manually by our team.

items.question: Will you try to sell me something?
items.answer: We will explain how the programme works if it is relevant. There is no hard sell — the goal is to help you decide what is right for your family.

items.question: What language is the intro call in?
items.answer: The intro call is in English.

introCall.bookingSectionTitle: Pick a time that works for you
introCall.emptySlotsMessage: No times available in this window — please reach out on WhatsApp.
introCall.loadErrorMessage: We could not load available times. Please refresh, or message us on WhatsApp.
introCall.thankYouBody: We will email you a confirmation with your call time.
introCall.slotUnavailableMessage: That time was just taken. Please pick another slot.
introCall.recentIntroMessage: It looks like you already booked an intro call recently — reply to your previous email or message me on WhatsApp.
introCall.topicsFieldLabel: Anything you want me to know before our call?
introCall.topicsFieldPlaceholder: Optional — share context that will help us make the most of 15 minutes.

meta.title: 预约免费 15 分钟介绍通话
meta.description: 选择合适时间与 Ida 进行免费 15 分钟介绍通话。无需承诺——聊聊孩子、家佣，以及 Evolve Sprouts 是否适合您。

socialImage.alt: 预约 Evolve Sprouts 免费介绍通话

hero.description: 选择您方便的时间。用 15 分钟了解您的情况，并判断课程是否合适——没有压力。

description.title: 这通电话是什么（不是什么）

items.title: 15 分钟一对一
items.description: 在您选定的时间进行简短视频或电话。我们会紧扣主题，让您带着清晰结论离开。

items.title: 无需承诺
items.description: 不收费，也没有报名义务。若不合适，也完全没问题。

items.title: 务实的下一步
items.description: 若 Evolve Sprouts 能提供帮助，我们会说明加入方式；若不适合，也会尽量给予有用方向。

items.title: 时长
items.description: 通话为 15 分钟。请准时加入，以便充分利用时间。

items.title: 改期
items.description: 需要改时间？请回复确认邮件或通过 WhatsApp 联系我们，我们将人工协助处理。

items.question: 介绍通话有多长？
items.answer: 15 分钟。我们保持精简，让您在不占用太多时间的情况下获得明确答案。

items.question: 真的免费吗？
items.answer: 是的，这通介绍通话不收费。

items.question: 如果我迟到了怎么办？
items.answer: 请尽量准时。若延误，请尽快通过 WhatsApp 告知——若时段已过，我们可能需要改期。

items.question: 如何取消或改期？
items.answer: 请回复确认邮件或通过 WhatsApp 联系我们。第一版流程由团队人工处理改期与取消。

items.question: 会被推销吗？
items.answer: 若相关，我们会说明课程如何运作。没有强硬推销——目标是帮助您判断什么对家庭最合适。

items.question: 介绍通话使用什么语言？

introCall.emptySlotsMessage: 该时段暂无可预约时间 — 请通过 WhatsApp 联系我们。
introCall.loadErrorMessage: 无法加载可预约时间。请刷新页面，或通过 WhatsApp 联系我们。
introCall.thankYouBody: 我们将向您发送确认邮件，内含通话时间。
introCall.slotUnavailableMessage: 该时间刚刚被占用，请另选时段。
introCall.recentIntroMessage: 您最近似乎已预约过介绍通话 — 请回复之前的确认邮件或通过 WhatsApp 联系我。
introCall.topicsFieldLabel: 在通话前您想让我了解的内容？
introCall.topicsFieldPlaceholder: 选填 — 分享有助于充分利用 15 分钟的背景信息。

meta.title: 預約免費 15 分鐘介紹通話
meta.description: 揀個方便時間同 Ida 做免費 15 分鐘介紹通話。無需承諾——傾下小朋友、家傭，同 Evolve Sprouts 啱唔啱你。

socialImage.alt: 預約 Evolve Sprouts 免費介紹通話

hero.description: 揀個你方便嘅時間。用 15 分鐘了解你嘅情況，同埋課程啱唔啱——冇壓力。

items.title: 15 分鐘一對一
items.description: 喺你揀定嘅時間進行短視像或電話。我哋會緊扣主題，等你可以帶住清晰結論離開。

items.title: 無需承諾
items.description: 唔使畀錢，亦冇報名義務。若果唔啱，都完全冇問題。

items.title: 務實嘅下一步
items.description: 若 Evolve Sprouts 幫到你，我哋會講明點樣加入；若唔適合，都會盡量俾個有用方向。

items.title: 長度
items.description: 通話為 15 分鐘。請準時加入，善用時間。

items.title: 改期
items.description: 需要改時間？請回覆確認電郵或透過 WhatsApp 聯絡我哋，我哋會人手協助。

items.question: 介紹通話有幾長？
items.answer: 15 分鐘。我哋保持精簡，等你可以喺唔使花太多時間嘅情況下得到清晰答案。

items.question: 真係免費？
items.answer: 係，呢通介紹通話唔收費。

items.question: 如果我遲到點算？
items.answer: 請盡量準時。若延誤，請盡快透過 WhatsApp 話我哋知——若時段已過，可能需要改期。

items.question: 點樣取消或改期？
items.answer: 請回覆確認電郵或透過 WhatsApp 聯絡我哋。第一版流程由團隊人手處理改期同取消。

items.question: 會唔會硬銷？
items.answer: 若相關，我哋會解釋課程點運作。冇硬銷——目標係幫你判斷咩先最啱你家庭。

introCall.emptySlotsMessage: 呢個時段暫時冇位 — 請透過 WhatsApp 聯絡我哋。
introCall.loadErrorMessage: 暫時載唔到可預約時間。請重新整理頁面，或者透過 WhatsApp 聯絡我哋。
introCall.thankYouBody: 我哋會發確認電郵俾你，入面有通話時間。
introCall.slotUnavailableMessage: 呢個時間啱啱俾人揀咗，請揀另一個時段。
introCall.recentIntroMessage: 你最近好似已經預約過介紹通話 — 請回覆之前嘅確認電郵或透過 WhatsApp 聯絡我。
introCall.topicsFieldPlaceholder: 選填 — 分享有助用盡 15 分鐘嘅背景。
